import aiomysql

async def retrieve_secure(pool, category_name: str):
    conn = await pool.acquire()
    try:
        cur = await conn.cursor(aiomysql.DictCursor)
        await cur.execute("SELECT * FROM payments WHERE order_id = %s", (category_name,))
        return await cur.fetchall()
    finally:
        await pool.release(conn)
